basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 119 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Rishikesh
basic_details.post_name: Faculty (Group A) - Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor
basic_details.total_vacancies: 119 Posts (29 Professor + 10 Additional Professor + 28 Associate Professor + 52 Assistant Professor)
basic_details.short_information: The latest All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Faculty (Group A) Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts! Published on 18 April 2026 at the aiimsrishikesh.edu.in, this new recruitment drive offers 119 vacancies for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of up to 50 years (Assistant/Associate Professor) and up to 58 years (Professor/Additional Professor) and possessing MD/MS/D.M./M.Ch./MBBS/BDS or Master’s with Ph.D. (as per post) can apply online from 18 April 2026

important_dates.cutoff date for age / qualification / ex: 30 days from the date of publication in Employment News / Rozgar Samachar

age_limit.details: The age limit to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026 is Not exceeding 58 years. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved category candidates as per government rules. | Age Relaxation

qualification.details: Professor - Medical Candidates: A medical qualification included in Schedule I, II, or Part II of the Third Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956 along with a postgraduate degree such as MD/MS or equivalent in the respective discipline. For surgical super-specialties, M.Ch. is required; for medical super-specialties, D.M. is required (2, 3, or 5-year recognized course). Experience required: 14 years after MD/MS, or 12 years after D.M./M.Ch. (2 or 5-year course after MBBS), or 11 years after a 3-year D.M./M.Ch. Non-Medical Candidates: Master's degree + Doctorate degree from a recognized university + 14 years of teaching/research experience after obtaining the doctorate. | Additional Professor - Medical Candidates: Same basic qualifications as Professor (Medical). Experience: 10 years after MD/MS; for super-specialty disciplines, 8 years after D.M./M.Ch. (2 or 5-year course), or 7 years after 3-year D.M./M.Ch. Non-Medical Candidates: Same as Professor (Non-Medical) + 10 years of experience after the doctorate. | Associate Professor - Medical Candidates (General Disciplines): Same as Professor (Medical) + 6 years of experience after MD/MS. For super-specialty disciplines, 4 years after D.M./M.Ch. (2 or 5-year course), or 3 years after 3-year D.M./M.Ch. Non-Medical Candidates: Same as Professor (Non-Medical) + 6 years of experience after the doctorate. | Assistant Professor - Medical Candidates (General Disciplines): Same as Professor (Medical) + 3 years of experience after MD/MS. For super-specialty disciplines, 1 year after D.M./M.Ch. (2 or 5-year course after MBBS); no experience required for candidates with 3-year D.M./M.Ch. Non-Medical Candidates: Same as Professor (Non-Medical) + 3 years of experience after the doctorate. | Hospital Administration Department: A medical qualification under Schedule I & II or Part II of the Third Schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, along with MD in Hospital Administration or a Master's Degree in Hospital Administration (MHA) from an MCI recognized institution. Experience varies by post: 14 years (Professor), 10 years (Additional Professor), 6 years (Associate Professor), or 3 years (Assistant Professor) after obtaining the postgraduate degree.

salary_details.details: Selected faculty candidates at AIIMS Rishikesh will be entitled to pay as per the 7th Central Pay Commission pay matrix levels applicable to Central Government employees. The pay levels and corresponding pay ranges are structured based on the post.

selection_process: 1. Shortlisting Based on bio-data by the Selection Committee
2. Interview Personal and physical appearance before Selection Committee at AIIMS Rishikesh
3. Document Verification Original documents to be produced at time of interview
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates satisfying all the eligibility criteria can apply through Online Mode only via the official AIIMS Rishikesh website https://aiimsrishikesh.edu.in.
The online application portal opened on 18 April 2026 at 10:00 hours and will automatically close on 18 May 2026 at 17:30 hours.
Candidates wishing to apply for more than one post must fill a separate online application form and pay a separate application fee for each post.
No documents, including the online application form, are required to be sent by post in advance.
Applicants should take a printout of their complete, signed application form and bring it to the interview along with originals and self-attested photocopies of all relevant certificates.

Candidates currently employed in Central/State Government organisations, PSUs, or Autonomous Bodies must inform their employer about their application and must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) at the time of interview and a Relieving Certificate from their present employer before joining the institute if selected.
All updates regarding the recruitment process will be published on the institute's website only, so candidates are advised to check it regularly.
Documents to be brought at the time of Interview:
NOC from present employer (for candidates working in Central/State Government / Semi Government Autonomous Institutions)
Caste/Category Certificate for ST/SC/OBC/EWS/PwBD (in the format prescribed by Government of India)
List of publications in indexed journals
Proof of payment of application fee
Any other relevant document to support your candidature

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AIIMS Rishikesh has notified 119 Faculty (Group A) vacancies, including 29 Professor, 10 Additional Professor, 28 Associate Professor and 52 Assistant Professor posts across various medical, surgical, dental, super‑specialty and hospital administration departments.

faq.question: Q2. What are the important dates for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 18 April 2026 (10:00 hrs) and closes on 18 May 2026 (17:30 hrs), while the last date for online submission of applications and the cut‑off date for age, qualification and experience is 30 days from publication in Employment News / Rozgar Samachar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty posts in 2026?
faq.answer: For Assistant Professor and Associate Professor, the upper age limit is not exceeding 50 years, and for Additional Professor and Professor, it is not exceeding 58 years, with relaxations of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBD and 5 years for Government servants beyond the respective upper age limits as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee per post is ₹3,000 for UR/EWS/OBC candidates and ₹500 for SC/ST candidates, while PwBD and Deputation candidates are exempted from payment of any fee; the fee is non‑refundable and payable only through the online payment gateway.

faq.question: Q5. What are the pay scales for Professor, Additional Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: As per the 7th CPC pay matrix for Central Government employees, the pay levels are: Professor – Level 14‑A (₹1,68,900–₹2,20,400), Additional Professor – Level 13A‑2 (₹1,48,200–₹2,11,400), Associate Professor – Level 13A‑1 (₹1,38,300–₹2,09,200) and Assistant Professor – Level 12 (₹1,01,500–₹1,67,400), along with applicable allowances like DA, HRA and other benefits as per rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty (Group A) 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process comprises shortlisting based on bio‑data by the Selection Committee, followed by an interview (personal appearance) at AIIMS Rishikesh. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview, and they must bring all original documents and self‑attested copies for verification; no written test is typically conducted for Group A faculty recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply online for AIIMS Rishikesh Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official website aiimsrishikesh.edu.in by opening the Faculty recruitment link, registering, filling in all personal/academic/experience details, uploading required documents, paying the prescribed fee per post, and submitting the form before 18 May 2026 (17:30 hrs); candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate applications and fees for each post.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key service conditions and general instructions for selected faculty at AIIMS Rishikesh?
faq.answer: Faculty appointments are full‑time, and private practice of any kind is strictly prohibited, with a probation period of two years. Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous bodies must produce NOC at the time of interview and a relieving order before joining. All qualifications must be registered with MCI/NMC/DCI wherever applicable, experience for SC/ST may be relaxable as per rules, canvassing leads to disqualification, and all disputes fall under the jurisdiction of courts at Dehradun.
